title: SC&A Legal expands to Delhi with Devangshu Lahiry at the helm
description: SC&A Legal has announced the expansion of its operations in New Delhi, marking a significant milestone in the firm's growth journey.The Delhi office will enable the firm to work more closely with clients, regulators, tribunals, and courts, while strengthening its ability to handle complex, multi-jurisdictional matters.The Delhi practice will be headed by Devangshu Lahiry, who has extensive experience in dispute resolution, commercial litigation, and advisory matters.
